title.en: Establish and Maintain an Inventory of Authentication and Authorization Systems

prose.en: Establish and maintain an inventory of the enterprise's authentication and authorization systems, including those hosted on-site or at a remote service provider. Review and update the inventory, at a minimum, annually, or more frequently.
An inventory of the enterprise's authentication and authorization systems is established and maintained, including those hosted on-site or at a remote service provider.
The inventory is reviewed and updated, at a minimum, annually, or more frequently.
